hero.title: Google Ads
hero.subtitle: Increase your online visibility and sales with expertly managed Google Ads campaigns

intro.title: Your Partner for Successful Google Advertising
intro.content: With years of experience in digital marketing, our team of Google Ads experts helps companies of every size achieve their business goals through precisely targeted and optimized ad campaigns. We specialize in building Google Ads strategies that maximize return on investment and deliver measurable results.

services.title: Our Google Ads services
services.subtitle: We provide a complete Google Ads service covering every type of campaign. Whatever your industry or goal, we have a solution that will deliver maximum results.

search.title: Search Campaigns
search.description: Appear at the top of Google Search when customers look for your products. Optimized campaigns for maximum conversion at minimum cost.

display.title: Display Campaigns
display.description: Visually engaging ads across more than 2 million websites. Ideal for remarketing and building brand recognition.

youtube.title: YouTube Advertising
youtube.description: Video campaigns on the largest video platform. Targeting based on demographics, interests, and user behavior.

shopping.title: Shopping Campaigns
shopping.description: The perfect solution for online stores. Products are shown directly in Google Search with an image, price, and name.

remarketing.title: Remarketing Campaigns
remarketing.description: Re-engage visitors who didn't complete a purchase. Personalized messages for different segments with a higher conversion rate.

app.title: App Campaigns
app.description: Promote mobile apps through Google Play Store and the App Store. Optimized campaigns for downloads and user activity.

smart.title: Smart Campaigns
smart.description: Automated campaigns that Google optimizes for you. Ideal for beginners or less complex goals with minimal management.

performanceMax.title: Performance Max
performanceMax.description: The newest campaign type, using AI to optimize across every Google channel. Maximum reach and performance in a single campaign.

local.title: Local Advertising
local.description: Target users near you. Ideal for local businesses, restaurants, service providers, and physical stores.

cta.title: Ready to increase your online sales?
cta.subtitle: Contact us for a free campaign analysis

why.title: Why Is Google Advertising Important for Your Business?

visibility.title: Instant Visibility
visibility.description: While SEO delivers results over a longer period, Google advertising makes you visible immediately, from day one of the campaign.

targeting.title: Precise Targeting
targeting.description: Target by location, time of day, device, demographics, and interests. Every click is measurable and transparent.

tracking.title: Detailed Tracking
tracking.description: The most detailed results-tracking capabilities of any ad platform. Every cost, every conversion - all fully transparent.

why.momentDescription: When someone searches Google for a product or service you offer, you can be the first company they see. That's the moment a potential customer is most ready to buy - actively searching for a solution to their problem.
why.momentHighlight: Google Ads lets you show up at that key moment

features.title: Why do clients choose our Google Ads services?

expertise.title: Proven Expertise
expertise.description: Our team of Google Ads experts manages campaigns with budgets ranging from a few hundred to several thousand euros a month, always achieving optimal results.

transparency.title: Transparent Business
transparency.description: You get detailed monthly reports with every key metric - conversions, cost per click, and recommendations for further improving your campaigns.

individual.title: An Individual Approach
individual.description: Every campaign is tailored to your business, industry, and target audience. We don't use templates - every project is unique.

optimization.title: Continuous Optimization
optimization.description: Your campaigns are constantly monitored, tested, and optimized for the best possible performance. A/B testing and analysis are part of our daily routine.

process.title: What does the Google Ads campaign process look like?

step1.title: Analysis and strategy
step1.description: We thoroughly analyze your business, competitors, and target audience, and set clear, measurable campaign goals. We research the market, analyze competitor campaigns, and build a strategy that will set your campaign apart. This stage is crucial because it helps us understand your vision and build a campaign that delivers maximum results.

step2.title: Keyword research
step2.description: We find the most relevant keywords with the best conversion potential, analyzing search volume and competition. We use professional keyword research tools and build a list of terms that will attract quality traffic. We focus on long-tail keywords, which have greater conversion potential.

step3.title: Campaign creation
step3.description: We set up the campaign in your Google Ads account, create compelling ads, and configure the budget and targeting. We create different ad versions for A/B testing, set up geographic and demographic targeting, and optimize landing pages for maximum conversion. Everything is tailored to your specific needs.

step4.title: Tracking and optimization
step4.description: We track performance daily, test different ad versions, optimize bids, and continuously improve results. We analyze metrics such as CTR, conversion rate, cost per acquisition, and ROI. We regularly adjust the strategy based on data and market trends.

step5.title: Reporting and analysis
step5.description: Every month you get a detailed report with all the key metrics and our recommendations for the next period. The report includes a performance analysis, a comparison with previous periods, competitor analysis, and concrete recommendations for improvement. We regularly hold meetings to discuss results and strategy.

step6.title: Continuous improvement
step6.description: We offer continuous optimization and performance improvement for your campaign. We keep up with the latest Google Ads features, test new approaches and strategies, and adapt to changes in the market. We're here to help with any questions or adjustments your campaign needs.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about Google Ads advertising

q1.question: What budget is needed for a Google Ads campaign?
q1.answer: The minimum recommended monthly budget depends on the industry and competition, but it generally starts at €300-500 per month. For more competitive fields, €1000+ may be needed to see significant results. During the consultation, we analyze your industry and competitors to give you a precise estimate of the optimal budget.

q2.question: How quickly can I see results?
q2.answer: The first results (clicks and traffic) are visible as soon as the campaign launches. However, for optimal performance and the best ROI, 2-3 months of continuous work and optimization are needed. Google's algorithm learns about your campaign over time, which results in better performance and lower cost per click.

q3.question: Do you only do the setup, or do you also manage the campaign?
q3.answer: We offer both options - we can just do the initial campaign setup, or you can hire our team for ongoing management, optimization, and monthly reports. Most clients choose the full management option since it delivers the best results. Our team regularly tracks performance and adjusts the strategy for maximum ROI.

q4.question: What if the campaign doesn't deliver results?
q4.answer: We work transparently and give realistic estimates. If, after the initial period, we see the results aren't satisfactory, we analyze the reasons together and adjust the strategy or budget. Our goal is always the maximum ROI for your budget.

q5.question: What types of Google Ads campaigns do you run?
q5.answer: We run every type of Google Ads campaign: Search campaigns for search, Display campaigns for visual advertising, Shopping campaigns for e-commerce, Video campaigns on YouTube, and App campaigns for mobile apps. We choose the best combination based on your goals and budget.

q6.question: Do I need to already have a Google Ads account?
q6.answer: You don't need an existing Google Ads account. We can create a new account for you or work with your existing one.

q7.question: How do you measure campaign success?
q7.answer: We measure success through key metrics such as ROI (return on investment), cost per acquisition (CPA), conversion rate, and quality score. In addition, we track business results such as increased sales, lead generation, and improved brand awareness. We regularly provide detailed reports with performance analysis and recommendations for improvement.
